prompt: Implement `flattenArray(arr: unknown[]): unknown[]` that recursively flattens a nested array of any depth into a single flat array, preserving order.
canonicalSolution: export function flattenArray(arr: unknown[]): unknown[] { const result: unknown[] = []; for (const item of arr) { if (Array.isArray(item)) result.push(...flattenArray(item)); else result.push(item); } return result; }
